# promote-action

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN тАФ do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Generic 'Set as default for everyone' action in the config settings detail pane: stages the descriptor's current user-layer document as a committed git default (review-pane apply lands it). Contributed into ConfigDetail.Action, so config_v2/settings stays ignorant of staging.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `ConfigDetail.Action` тЖТ `PromoteDefaultAction`
  - Uses: `config_v2/settings.ConfigDetail`, `config_v2/staging.useStageDefault`, `config_v2/staging.useStagedValue`, `primitives/css/badge.Badge`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.Button`, `primitives/tooltip.WithTooltip`, `shell/toast.showToast`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
